title: Learn at Your Own Pace
intro: From your first "Jambo!" to fluent conversations — we have a class that fits exactly where you are.

items.title: Kiswahili Basics
items.description: Greetings, numbers, everyday phrases and the building blocks of Swahili grammar.

items.title: Conversational Swahili
items.description: Hold real conversations about work, food, travel and Kenyan culture with confidence.

items.title: Fluency & Literature
items.description: Dive into Swahili poetry, proverbs, newspaper reading and professional writing.

items.title: Swahili for Children
items.description: Songs, stories and games that make language learning magical for ages 5-12.

items.title: Swahili for Business
items.description: Corporate vocabulary, negotiation phrases, and East African business etiquette.

items.title: Weekend Immersion
items.description: A 2-day intensive retreat - no English allowed. Complete with cultural activities and local excursions.
